task.name: Validate Workflow Output
task.description: Validate a workflow-generated artifact against its checklist and report gaps before completion.
task.objective: Review a generated artifact against the current workflow checklist and produce a concise validation summary.

llm.i: MANDATORY: Execute ALL steps in the flow section IN EXACT ORDER
DO NOT skip steps or change the sequence
Use the current workflow context when available
If a required file is missing, clearly report that and continue only when the remaining validation is still meaningful
Be specific about failed, partial, or unverifiable checklist items

step.title: Resolve Inputs
step.action: Load the checklist referenced by the calling workflow when available
Load the target artifact referenced by the calling workflow when available, preferring the workflow output file or story file from current context
If either checklist or target artifact is unavailable, report which input is missing and halt validation

step.title: Review Checklist
step.action: Identify each checklist item or validation requirement that can be evaluated against the target artifact

step.title: Validate Artifact
step.action: Compare the target artifact against every checklist item
Classify each item as PASS, PARTIAL, FAIL, or UNVERIFIABLE
Capture concrete reasons for every non-PASS result

step.title: Report Results
step.action: List failed, partial, or unverifiable items first
If all evaluated items pass, state that explicitly

halt-conditions.condition: HALT if the checklist file cannot be found
HALT if the target artifact cannot be found
